# ERPlora UX · Full Reference (v2.0.0)

This document is the **complete machine-readable inventory** of every class
shipped by the library. Drop it into an LLM context window when you need
exhaustive autocompletion, code-review, or generation against the library.

For a shorter agent-focused guide, see AGENTS.md.

---

## What this is

CSS-only semantic component library. Single bundle:
`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ERPlora/ux@v2.0.0/dist/erplora-ux.min.css`

Class prefix: `ux-`
BEM-light pattern: `ux-{block}__{element}--{modifier}`
Runtime states: `is-active`, `is-open`, `is-loading`, `is-disabled`, `is-selected`
Themes: `data-theme="erplora" | "dark" | "light"` on `<html>` or any subtree.

Optional Datastar interactivity: `data-signals`, `data-show`, `data-bind-*`,
`data-on-click`, `data-class-*`. Library is functional without JS.

## Status / color modifiers (consistent across components)

- `--brand`           Primary accent (terracota)
- `--ok` / `--leaf`   Success
- `--warn`            Warning
- `--danger`          Error / destructive
- `--info`            Informational
- `--solid`           Filled variant of the same state
- `--ghost`           Borderless minimal variant
- `--outline`         Border-only variant
- `--sm` / `--lg` / `--xs` / `--xl`   Size scale
- `--block`           Full-width
- `--compact` / `--dense`   Reduced padding
- `--inline`          Inline layout

## Tokens (override on `:root` to retheme)

Brand:        --ux-brand, --ux-brand-2, --ux-brand-3, --ux-brand-fg, --ux-brand-soft
Status:       --ux-leaf, --ux-warn, --ux-danger, --ux-info  (each has *-soft, *-fg)
Surfaces:     --ux-bg, --ux-bg-1 .. --ux-bg-4
Lines:        --ux-line, --ux-line-2, --ux-line-3
Text:         --ux-ink, --ux-ink-2, --ux-ink-3, --ux-ink-4
Spacing:      --ux-space-0 .. --ux-space-6  (4px scale)
Radii:        --ux-radius-sm, --ux-radius-md, --ux-radius-lg, --ux-radius-pill
Typography:   --ux-text-2xs .. --ux-text-5xl, --ux-leading-*, --ux-tracking-*
Motion:       --ux-dur-fast, --ux-dur-base, --ux-ease-out
Fonts:        --ux-font-sans (Inter), --ux-font-display (Inter Tight),
              --ux-font-mono (JetBrains Mono)

## Utilities (subset, not a full Tailwind)

Layout:    .ux-flex .ux-grid .ux-block .ux-hidden .ux-row .ux-col .ux-wrap .ux-nowrap
Align:     .ux-items-{start|center|end|baseline}
Justify:   .ux-justify-{start|center|end|between}
Gap:       .ux-gap-{1..6}
Flex:      .ux-flex-1 .ux-shrink-0 .ux-min-w-0
Sizing:    .ux-w-full .ux-h-full
Text size: .ux-text-{xs|sm|md|base|lg|xl|2xl}
Weight:    .ux-font-{medium|semibold|bold}
Align:     .ux-text-{left|center|right}  .ux-truncate
Color:     .ux-c-{ink|ink-2|ink-3|brand|leaf|warn|danger}
Position:  .ux-relative .ux-absolute .ux-sticky .ux-fixed .ux-inset-0
Border:    .ux-border .ux-border-{t|b}
Radius:    .ux-rounded-{sm|md|lg|pill}
Responsive hide: .ux-hide-{sm|md|lg}

## Class catalog (per source file)

Each section below corresponds to one CSS file in `lib/css/components/`.
Block classes appear first; their `__elements` and `--modifiers` follow.

## app-shell
.ux-app
.ux-app__body
.ux-app__main
.ux-app__sidebar-overlay
.ux-app__tabbar
